title: Home-Screen widget: reviews due
description: WidgetKit extension showing due-review count + next-due time; timeline entries are exactly predictable from the SRS schedule. Needs an extension target, App Groups entitlement, and the store already sits behind PersistenceStack.storeURL(appGroupID:) (T068) so no data migration. v1.5 candidate.

title: App Intent: 'Start my review' (Siri/Shortcuts/Spotlight)
description: Small App Intent launching straight into a review session; no extension target needed. Pairs well with the widget. v1.5 candidate.

title: Adopt real Liquid Glass APIs when min target allows
description: glassEffect()/GlassEffectContainer are iOS 26-only; when the deployment target moves, wrap the floating tab bar + frosted chrome in #available(iOS 26) glass with the current material as fallback.
